user.title: Select Manufacturer
user.description: Choose a device manufacturer to filter by, or select 'All manufacturers' to see all devices.

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Select the device to add a calibrated sensor to.

configure.title: Configure Calibration
configure.description: Set up the MQTT topic and calibration factor. Raw values from the topic will be multiplied by the calibration factor to produce a sensor value in cm.

data_description.mqtt_topic: The MQTT topic that publishes the raw numeric value
data_description.calibration_factor: Multiplier applied to the raw value (calibrated = raw × factor)
data_description.name: Friendly name for the calibrated sensor

error.invalid_topic: Could not receive data from this MQTT topic. Verify the topic is correct and the device is publishing.
error.unknown_device: Selected device was not found in the device registry.
error.no_devices: No devices found matching your criteria.

abort.no_devices: No devices were found in the Home Assistant device registry.
